mappings.rationaleAI: Engineering addresses history of technological sciences (A), engineering as profession (B.1), and branches (B.2).

AI addresses natural models for engineering problems (D.1.b).
Nanotechnology relates to bionics and interscience disciplines (D.1).
Materials science relates to branches of engineering (B.2).
Energy systems relate to branches of engineering (B.2).

Nuclear power relates to nuclear engineering (B.2).

Computational theory and biological computing relate to natural models for engineering (D.1.b).

Complex systems theory relates to systems engineering and operations research (D.2).
Computing history relates to history of technological sciences (A).
Nuclear weapons relate to nuclear engineering (B.2).
